summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Girogirotondo kindergarten app with updated warm pastel UI. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate). Frontend shows all required features including illustrated SVG icons, colored activity dots, and warm pastel colors. Authentication session persistence issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Session persistence issue causing frequent redirects to login page

integration_issues.issue: Authentication tokens not persisting properly, causing session timeouts

design_issues.issue: Omnia footer not consistently visible on all dashboard pages

passed_tests: Backend API authentication (all roles: admin, teacher, parent)
Backend user management endpoints
Backend classes and students endpoints
Backend griglia endpoints with new fields (colazione, pranzo, frutta, merenda, cacca, pisolino)
Backend content endpoints (diary, gallery, meals)
Backend appointments system
Backend documents and read receipts
Login page with enlarged school logo (w-44 h-44)
School name with pastel colors (blue, pink, green)
Parent dashboard with illustrated SVG icons (16 found)
Parent greeting with 'Paolo Marino' display
Diario di Bordo card with diary text preview
Griglia Giornaliera card with colored activity dots (Colazione, Pranzo, Merenda, Pisolino)
Foto e Video del Giorno with thumbnail gallery strip
Alimentazione & Dieta card with meal preview grid
Bottom navigation with Home, Documenti, Dieta, Utente
Teacher dashboard with 'Giulia Bianchi' greeting and class 'Farfalle'
Student list display with child codes
Warm pastel background color (#FFFDD0) detected
Omnia footer with GDPR compliance text on login page
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (23/23 tests passed), Frontend: 85% (authentication persistence issue)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication session persistence issue causing frequent redirects to login page. Ensure Omnia footer is consistently visible on all dashboard pages. All other features working correctly.
